verdict_detail: Shell-write guard hardened, dry-run 12/12, registered on Bash|PowerShell, and confirmed LIVE (it blocked a real command mid-gate). Patch A persisted via local vault commit 8ed9736. Patch B/C remain working-tree-ACTIVE but not committed (operator pre-existing edits mixed into CLAUDE.md/pending.md, unseparable without interactive staging). Authorization paths #1/#2 did not exist (typo) -> hardened the real user-level guard, disclosed. Cycle CLOSED/PARKED.

structural_findings: LOCKOUT: with the guard live, scope-guard.ps1 + settings.json are un-writable via Edit (GUARD 2) AND shell (GUARD 0); did not obfuscate-evade my own control to apply the refinement.

BYPASS UNREACHABLE FROM TOOL: a PreToolUse hook runs with Claude Code's spawn-time env; $env:CLAUDE_SACRED_BYPASS set inside a tool command is invisible to it. Env bypass only works if set in Claude Code's launch env. Recommend a reachable sentinel-file bypass (follow-up).
